title: ActionController: halted_callback
description: A before/around filter halted the Rails request processing chain.

filter.description: Name of the filter/callback that halted the chain.

request_id.description: Rails request UUID, present on any event fired during a web request context. Merged globally by the Honeybadger agent.

hostname.description: Server hostname. Attached to every event by default (events.attach_hostname).

environment.description: Application environment, e.g. "production". Attached to every event by default (events.attach_environment).
